title: Prior-Only Degradation Residual Features
summary: Official F1 tyre analytics frame tyre condition as relative performance loss, not just age, and recent F1 research models degradation as a latent state inferred from lap times.
rationale: Official F1 tyre analytics frame tyre condition as relative performance loss, not just age, and recent F1 research models degradation as a latent state inferred from lap times. That supports replacing fixed compound-life heuristics with residuals to an estimated degradation curve.
implementation_hint: Within each `Race_Year x Compound` or `Driver x Race_Year x Stint`, fit a prior-only spline/isotonic/Kalman-like curve of `LapTime_Delta` or pace loss versus `TyreLife`, using only earlier laps. Feed the model the current residual-to-curve, local slope, curvature, and distance to the inferred performance cliff or reset.
expected_effect: Should catch imminent stops when the tyre is degrading faster or differently than the nominal compound window, especially where the current handcrafted life maps are too static.
risk: Neutralized laps and fuel/load effects can distort the curve unless you filter or model regimes separately; OOF generation is mandatory.
